source:
import { FadeIn } from "@/components/FadeIn"; import { AnimatedText } from "@/components/AnimatedText"; import { Button } from "@/components/Button"; import Link from "next/link"; import { ShieldCheck, Sparkles, Gem, ArrowRight } from "lucide-react"; import Image from "next/image"; import { Metadata } from "next"; export const metadata: Metadata = { title: "About Us | ZYNORA LUXE", description: "Where timeless elegance meets exceptional craftsmanship. Discover the story, values, and uncompromising quality of ZYNORA LUXE.", }; export default function AboutPage() { return (
{/* SECTION 1 — ABOUT HERO */}


{/* SECTION 2 — BRAND STORY */}

Born from a profound vision of absolute excellence, ZYNORA LUXE was established to redefine the boundaries of high-end diamond jewelry. Our foundation is built upon decades of generational expertise in sourcing the rarest gems on earth.

We are inspired by timeless royalty, carefully blending historic heritage with cutting-edge modern innovation. Every facet, every setting, and every curve is meticulously designed to reflect light with unparalleled brilliance. Our uncompromising dedication to quality has positioned ZYNORA LUXE as a beacon of enduring luxury.

{/* SECTION 3 — CRAFTSMANSHIP */}
The Artistry

Master Craftsmanship

True luxury is defined by the unseen details. Handcrafted by master jewelers who bring decades of experience, every piece that bears the ZYNORA LUXE name is an immaculate work of art.

From the initial sketch to the final polish, our artisans oversee each stage of creation. Utilizing micro-pavé techniques and precision prong settings engineered under extreme magnification, we ensure maximum light performance and structural security without compromising the delicate aesthetic of the design.

{/* SECTION 4 — DIAMOND QUALITY */}

Rigorous Selection

We reject 99% of the world's diamonds. Only those exhibiting absolute purity, ideal proportions, and flawless symmetry are chosen for our collections.

Unmatched Brilliance

Our signature cut standards far exceed industry norms, extracting maximum fire, brilliance, and scintillation from the heart of the stone.

Quality Standards

Every center diamond is independently graded by the most respected gemological laboratories and accompanied by full certification of its pedigree.

{/* SECTION 5 — BRAND VALUES */}

{[ { title: "Quality", desc: "Uncompromising standards in every material we select and every piece we finish." }, { title: "Authenticity", desc: "Transparent sourcing and genuine artistry behind every signature design." }, { title: "Innovation", desc: "Pushing the boundaries of traditional techniques to create something truly modern." }, { title: "Timeless Elegance", desc: "Designing heirloom pieces that remain breathtaking for generations to come." } ].map((value, i) => (
{i + 1}

{value.title}

{value.desc}

))}
{/* SECTION 6 — CLOSING STATEMENT */}

); }

messages.message:
Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Math.random` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

C:\Users\Nisarg\OneDrive\Desktop\krishna-diamonds-next\app\(storefront)\order-success\page.tsx:66:39
  64 |                         height: `${p.size}px`,
  65 |                         animationDelay: p.delay,
> 66 |                         borderRadius: Math.random() > 0.5 ? "50%" : "0",
     |                                       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  67 |                     }}
  68 |                 />
  69 |             ))}
'router' is assigned a value but never used.

source:
import { Metadata } from "next"; import Link from "next/link"; import { PrismaClient } from "@prisma/client"; import { FadeIn } from "@/components/FadeIn"; import { Button } from "@/components/Button"; import { SmartImage } from "@/components/SmartImage"; import { ArrowRight, Gem, ShieldCheck, Sparkles, Palette, Diamond, Crown } from "lucide-react"; const prisma = new PrismaClient(); function getImages(images: string | string[] | null | undefined) { if (!images) return []; if (Array.isArray(images)) return images; try { return JSON.parse(images) as string[]; } catch { return []; } } export const metadata: Metadata = { title: "Luxury Diamonds & Custom Rings | ZYNORA LUXE", description: "Design your perfect ring, shop premium jewelry, and discover certified diamonds at ZYNORA LUXE.", openGraph: { title: "ZYNORA LUXE", description: "Premium jewelry and personalized ring customization.", const [featuredProducts, featuredDiamonds, featuredSettings] = await Promise.all([ type: "website", }, }; }), prisma.diamond.findMany({ where: { stockStatus: "AVAILABLE" }, orderBy: [{ caratWeight: "desc" }, { createdAt: "desc" }], take: 3, }), prisma.setting.findMany({ orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }, take: 3, }), const [featuredProducts] = await Promise.all([ prisma.product.findMany({ const heroProduct = featuredProducts[0]; const heroImage = getImages(heroProduct?.images)[0] || ""; where: { isFeatured: true },

Zynora Luxe

Luxury jewelry, diamonds, and custom rings designed with quiet precision.

Explore a refined jewelry destination built around premium product imagery, a smooth customizer, and a faster path from discovery to purchase.

{[ ["Certified", "Diamonds selected for clarity, cut, and trust."], ["Custom", "Build a ring around the setting and stone you want."], ["Delivered", "Secure checkout and insured delivery support."], ].map(([title, copy]) => (

{title}

{copy}

))}

Custom Ring Studio

Choose the setting first, then shape the rest around it.

Customize Ring

A guided ring builder with a clean, focused flow.

Start with a setting, choose a diamond, select a metal, and review everything in one simple path. The experience is designed to feel premium on desktop and effortless on mobile.

{[ "Elegant settings", "Diamond pairing", "Metal selection", "Cart-ready review", ].map((item) => ( {item} ))}

Buy Diamond

Diamond selection with strong visual hierarchy.

View all
{featuredDiamonds.map((diamond, index) => (
Certified Diamond ₹{diamond.price.toLocaleString("en-IN")}

{diamond.caratWeight.toFixed(2)} ct {diamond.shape}

{diamond.color} color, {diamond.clarity} clarity, {diamond.cut} cut.

 ))}

Buy Jewelry

Finished jewelry presented in a clean retail grid.

{featuredProducts.map((product, index) => { const image = getImages(product.images)[0] || ""; return (

Featured Piece

{product.name}

Luxury jewelry ₹{Number(product.price).toLocaleString("en-IN")}
); })}

Brand Trust

Minimal, transparent, and built around confidence at every step.

Every visual surface in the store now follows the same spacing, card treatment, and image logic, so users can move from discovery to checkout without visual friction.

{[ ["Certified", "Verified diamond inventory"], ["Secure", "Protected checkout flow"], ["Support", "Guided ring customization"], ].map(([title, copy]) => (

{title}

{copy}

))}
{[ { icon: Gem, title: "Certified selection", copy: "Loose diamonds and fine jewelry use type-aware fallback imagery so every card stays relevant." }, { icon: ShieldCheck, title: "Purchase confidence", copy: "Checkout, cart, and payment continue to use the same secure flow and order logic." }, { icon: Crown, title: "Premium presentation", copy: "Large section spacing and consistent cards keep the storefront visually calm." }, ].map((item) => (

{item.title}

{item.copy}

))}
); }

An interface declaring no members is equivalent to its supertype.

suggestions.desc: Replace empty interface with a type alias.

suppressedMessages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

suggestions.desc: Remove unused import declaration.
